text.title: Flux CD — Setup and Operation Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns from real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Some manifests applied via Flux, some via kubectl in a Job.
Image updated via PR each time; latency high.
antipattern.fix: Wire image automation to close the loop.

antipattern.symptom: Reconcile fails for 2 days; nobody notices.
antipattern.fix: Configure provider + channel; test with a forced failure.
